_comment: These files run on Deno (Supabase Edge runtime), not Node. The VS Code TypeScript service should ignore them — the Deno extension handles type checking, or treat them as plain JS via the lib/types below to suppress 'Cannot find module' on https:// imports and the global Deno. moduleResolution stays 'Node' (= node10) so Deno-style 'import { x } from "https://…/file.ts"' specifiers resolve; 'Bundler'/'NodeNext' both reject the explicit .ts extension and the wildcard https:// module shape. ignoreDeprecations silences TS 6.x's node10 deprecation warning until we migrate these to the Deno LSP.
